description_long: This is a futuristic handgun with a sleek, angular design, primarily finished in a combination of matte white, black, and blue accents. The frame features a prominent, ergonomic grip with vertical blue ribbing for enhanced hold, and the trigger guard is integrated into the lower frame with a squared-off, modern appearance. The slide is streamlined, with subtle geometric lines and a small digital display on the rear, possibly indicating ammunition count or status. The barrel is elongated and tapers towards the muzzle, with no visible external threading or compensators. Minimalistic markings and a lack of traditional iron sights contribute to its advanced, sci-fi aesthetic. The overall construction suggests a lightweight yet durable build, likely utilizing advanced polymers and metal alloys.
description: A sleek, futuristic handgun with a white, black, and blue color scheme, ergonomic ribbed grip, and digital rear display. Its angular, modern design and minimal markings give it a high-tech appearance.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the handgun, highlighting the blue ribbed grip, angular frame, and streamlined slide.
description_view_1: Front-on view emphasizing the narrow barrel profile and the symmetry of the upper and lower frame.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with similar features visible, including the grip texture and slide contours.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the digital display on the back of the slide and the top contours of the handgun.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is ergonomically contoured with a pronounced curve to fit the hand comfortably, featuring vertical blue ribbed texturing for enhanced traction and a modern aesthetic. The material appears to be a high-strength polymer, and the grip is integrated seamlessly into the frame without visible screws or fasteners. There are no visible logos, finger grooves, or embellishments, giving it a clean, futuristic look.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is squared-off and robust, with a thick, angular profile that blends smoothly into the lower frame. It lacks undercuts or additional texturing, maintaining a minimalist, modern appearance. The guard is large enough to accommodate gloved fingers and has no visible reinforcement or accessory rails.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is long and tapers slightly towards the muzzle, with a smooth, unadorned exterior and no visible threading, ports, or compensators. The finish matches the rest of the handgun, with a matte, metallic sheen and no external markings.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible manufacturer logos, model names, serial numbers, or caliber designations on the slide. The only notable feature is a subtle geometric line running along the slide, contributing to the overall futuristic design.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, with no visible extensions, flares, or finger rests. The design is minimalistic, matching the clean lines of the handgun, and there are no logos or texturing present.
